#define NUM_DISKS 2;
#define NUM_PEGS 3;
#define DISK_EMPTY 0;
#define DISK_SMALL 1;
#define DISK_LARGE 2;

var pegs[NUM_PEGS][NUM_DISKS] = [DISK_LARGE, DISK_SMALL, DISK_EMPTY, DISK_EMPTY, DISK_EMPTY, DISK_EMPTY];

hanoi() = 
  [pegs[0][0] == DISK_LARGE && pegs[0][1] == DISK_SMALL && pegs[1][0] == DISK_EMPTY && pegs[1][1] == DISK_EMPTY] move_small_0_to_1_src_full_dest_empty { pegs[0][1] = DISK_EMPTY; pegs[1][0] = DISK_SMALL; } -> hanoi()

  [pegs[0][0] == DISK_SMALL && pegs[0][1] == DISK_EMPTY && pegs[1][0] == DISK_EMPTY && pegs[1][1] == DISK_EMPTY] move_small_0_to_1_src_only_dest_empty { pegs[0][0] = DISK_EMPTY; pegs[1][0] = DISK_SMALL; } -> hanoi()

  [pegs[0][0] == DISK_LARGE && pegs[0][1] == DISK_SMALL && pegs[1][0] == DISK_LARGE && pegs[1][1] == DISK_EMPTY] move_small_0_to_1_src_full_dest_large { pegs[0][1] = DISK_EMPTY; pegs[1][1] = DISK_SMALL; } -> hanoi()

  []
  [pegs[0][0] == DISK_LARGE && pegs[0][1] == DISK_SMALL && pegs[2][0] == DISK_EMPTY && pegs[2][1] == DISK_EMPTY] move_small_0_to_2_src_full_dest_empty { pegs[0][1] = DISK_EMPTY; pegs[2][0] = DISK_SMALL; } -> hanoi()

#assert hanoi() reaches goal;

#define BANK_OPEN 1;

#define balance_nonnegative (balanceN1 >= 0 && balanceN2 >= 0);
#define accounts_closed (account1State == ACCOUNT_CLOSED && account2State == ACCOUNT_CLOSED);
